CategoryReportOut.description:
One category bucket. `display_name` is server-localized so the
parent web doesn't need a translation table to show "水果" / etc.
CategoryReportOut.title: CategoryReportOut

ChildReportOut.description:
Aggregate per-child report. Field set is identical to the client's
`LearningReport`; field names use snake_case (parent web reads JSON).
ChildReportOut.title: ChildReportOut

DraftApproveOut.description: Approve response — surfaces both the persisted draft and the touched word.
DraftApproveOut.title: DraftApproveOut

FamilyPackDraftWordIn.description:
Body of `PUT /api/v1/family/{family_id}/family-packs/{id}/draft/words/{word_id}`.

`source` selects the entry shape:
- `global`: this draft pulls (or re-pulls) a global admin word; only the
  `id` (the path param) matters; server stores the latest global view.
- `custom`: parent supplies the full entry. The path `word_id` MUST
  start with `fam-<family_id_8>-` (validated by the service).
- `hidden`: parent wants this global id hidden; we persist
  `{ id: <word_id>, hidden: true }` only.
FamilyPackDraftWordIn.title: FamilyPackDraftWordIn

PackDetailOut.description: Full word_pack document (admin only — used by /admin/packs/{version}).
PackDetailOut.title: PackDetailOut

PackReportOut.description: One word-pack bucket, matching the client-side `PackReport`.
PackReportOut.title: PackReportOut

RedemptionPollOut.description:
Returned from `GET /api/v1/family/{family_id}/redemption-requests/poll`.

The device shares its last-seen `since_ms` so we only return rows whose
decision (or expiry) happened after that cursor.
RedemptionPollOut.title: RedemptionPollOut

RequestCodeOut.description:
Always 202: response intentionally does not reveal whether the email
is known, to prevent enumeration.
RequestCodeOut.title: RequestCodeOut

note.description: Free-form note from the model: which list it picked, anything it rejected (unit titles, grammar topics, page numbers). Empty string if nothing notable.
note.title: Note

words.description: Ordered list of memorisable vocabulary entries, in the order they appear in the source's primary vocabulary list.
words.title: Words

ScanWord.description: One vocabulary entry the model believes the student must memorize.

gloss_zh.description: Short Chinese gloss / translation if it is printed alongside the headword on the page. Empty string if no Chinese gloss is visible.
gloss_zh.title: Gloss Zh

word.description: The headword as printed in the textbook's vocabulary list. Lowercase unless the source is a proper noun. No punctuation.
word.title: Word

ScanWord.title: ScanWord

post.description:
Always 202: do NOT reveal whether the email is known (anti-enumeration).

Sends the OTP email only when not rate-limited. Email-delivery failures
are degraded silently — the row is persisted and the user can retry; we
do not leak provider state to the public endpoint.

post.description:
V0.6.7 — explicit device unbind. Sets revoked_at; subsequent
/api/v1/family/{family_id}/* calls with the same token return 404 BINDING_REVOKED.

schema.title: Response Post Unbind Api V1 Family  Family Id  Unbind Post
Response Health Api V1 Public Health Get

get.description:
Serve the current published pack JSON.

Honors ``If-None-Match`` per RFC 7232 — when the operator's cached
ETag still matches the current pack version, return ``304 Not
Modified`` with no body.

Public QA preview manifest (proxied from Vercel Blob).

**Unauthenticated** — no Authorization header, cookies, or API keys required.
Safe for DevMenu and scripted clients to fetch directly.
Canonical pre-login parent shell entry (no decorative `{family_id}` segment).
